Changed: Major speed boost for Multi Links & Bulk downloads — single yt-dlp process instead of one per URL
Added persistent yt-dlp cache — player API data shared across all downloads to reduce 'Fetching' time
Force IPv4 connections to YouTube — bypasses throttled/slow IPv6 routes
Unified download logs with compact raw yt-dlp streaming and shimmer feedback
Shrunk log font to 10sp for better visibility on mobile screens
Fixed: Fixed 'Separate Folder' duplicate detection and restored Android music notification playback controls.
Completed files lost when cancelling multi-item downloads mid-way — now saves whatever finished
Cancelling audio download triggered auto-retry at lower bitrate instead of stopping
Resolved race conditions in the cancellation flow to ensure stable state resets
Removed: Redundant counter headers (0/N) and custom log prefixes for a cleaner interface
Full-screen log viewer screen and Logs button from error actions

Added: Added a Homepage shortcut in Settings to open the Hazel landing page directly in-app
Added a Share Hazel option in Settings to easily send the app link to others
Changed: License now opens a clean, formatted page instead of a raw file
Significantly improved APK download speed by optimizing network buffer size

Added: Dedicated Software Update screen with version info, progress, and install controls
Animated update indicator in top bar with accent-color fill animation
Smart APK caching — skips re-download if already cached
Changed: Settings 'Check for Updates' now opens the Update screen directly
Centralized update state into single ViewModel
Fixed: Always downloading universal APK instead of device-specific arm64
GitHub Pages changelog not loading (invalid JSON)

Added: YouTube, Instagram & 3000+ platform support via yt-dlp
Audio extraction in MP3, AAC, FLAC, WAV, and Opus formats
Playlist, Multi Links, and Bulk download modes
Built-in music player with background playback
Video to audio converter with FFmpeg
In-app auto-update system via GitHub Releases
11 accent color themes with dark/light mode
Download history with search and file manager integration
